spec_match.rationale: The demo accurately captures and displays the 'Sec-Purpose: prefetch' header on injected link prefetch requests using a local Service Worker.

interactive.rationale: The page provides active buttons to register a service worker and trigger live speculative and real requests, showing real captured headers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The blurb aligns well with the actual demo behavior demonstrating the new header value.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates both prefetch and standard fetch side-by-side, showing when the header is and isn't sent.

references.rationale: The page links back to the main feature index and directly to the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: The styles use the shared CSS variables from the design system correctly and maintain good contrast.

summary: A well-implemented, highly interactive basic demonstration of the Sec-Purpose header on link prefetches using a Service Worker tracer.
